description: A color outdoor photograph of the Frances Perkins Department of Labor Building in Washington, D.C. A woman in a bright red pantsuit (apparently Labor Secretary) stands alone on the empty plaza/steps in front of the building. The concrete facade has a very large American flag hung vertically in the center and two large portrait banners flanking it: at left a banner showing Frances Perkins(?) and at right another historical figure, both bearing 'AMERICA 250' branding and the text 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST'. OCR detected no overlaid graphic text. Note: the banner portraits are too small and oblique to identify with certainty.
notable_text: AMERICA 250; AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST (on building banners)
